content: Just as human language learners build mastery of vocabulary like 'reflexion' through repeated reflective review of usage and meaning, large language models can achieve more robust, human-aligned output by integrating structured language learning-style reflexion into the Self-Refine iterative feedback loop. This hybrid framework treats each round of LLM output refinement as a learning event, not just an editing pass, where the model encodes contextual lessons about what makes a high-quality output into its dynamic working memory.
